title: Vestiges of the Present
description: Hardcore challenges that scales from other mods and awarded with powerful and unique Vestiges from unknown God-like creature. Has lore progression and a lot of cool stuff like negative enchantments, anti heal, heal debt, shields, over heal/shields, etc.
body:
[Discord Channel](https://discord.gg/8HjGaRrMgf)

My mod adds **Challenges** from unknown powerful creature that you are destined to know through Lore progression.

**Challenges** are compatible with any mod in your modpack and resolves one of the hardest problems in modpacks - balance.

Some mods may be overpowered and cheap, others may be useless and funny but long time to invest, with my Challenges both are needed to progress and that gives both of them reason to progress backed up by a valuable reward - Vestiges.

What Vestiges are you will know from the Lore, but briefly it's mighty tools for PVP and PVE allowing you making things other mods cant.

## List of items in my mod:

## Features a global leaderboard system that includes all players with internet access who abide by the rules. The leaderboard is accessible in any world, whether in single-player mode or on a server!

## THERE IS A CRUEL MODE?
Yes! Just type /vestiges enableCruel and you will know what bosses should feel like! (and not only bosses, Starving and Drowning damage will become unblockable so you wont ignore them in you cool fancy armor with bunch of passive talents and magic), mobs will have 1% chance to spawn Empowered.

In this mode all bosses from any mod will have x4 health and damage, 100 armor points and armor toughness, 90% damage reduction, heal over time by health%, and SHIELDS WITH OVER SHIELDS! Shields and Over Shields will protect from any damage, but what is the difference between them? You gotta know it from the command /vestiges help :) All values and boss list are configurable as you wish.

Also all mobs will have a high chance to spawn in random armor of your modpack and you will grant access to some powerfull drops from mobs and bosses in this mode, that allows to make negative enchantmnets on items and exceed their limit.

Also you will grant access to some powerfull drops from mobs and bosses in this mode, that allows to make negative enchantmnets on items and exceed their litim.
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/235496acaea6d269d900ad78946aac3b0b5aa656.png)

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6d4b396771b3e26e96c6da05e336c32dddab62ba_0.webp)

What should I do if some bosses or mobs are in Challenge and not summonable?
You can confugure any challenge to have lower maximum for completing! All challenge elements will still count as before, challenge will just be finished earlier.
